summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PDF/Image Translation App MVP. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend loads with dark theme and all core features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/providers returns 3 providers (openai, gemini, claude)
Backend API /api/history returns empty array initially
File upload dropzone visible and clickable
Language selectors work (source: English, target: Spanish)
Language swap button present and functional
AI Provider selection works (OpenAI, Gemini, Claude buttons clickable)
Translation history shows empty state correctly
Translate button disabled when no file selected
All UI sections present (Upload, Languages, Providers, History)
